message:
feat(extras): add canvas adapters for visual FX (bd-l8x9.6)

Add PlasmaCanvasAdapter and MetaballsCanvasAdapter that use the shared
sampling API to fill a Painter at sub-pixel (Braille 2x4) resolution.

- PlasmaCanvasAdapter: Fills painter with plasma wave colors
- MetaballsCanvasAdapter: Fills painter with metaballs field colors
- Uses shared PlasmaSampler and MetaballFieldSampler (no duplicated math)
- Feature-gated behind cfg(feature = "canvas")
- 9 unit tests covering fill, determinism, quality tiers, edge cases
- No allocations per frame (painter buffers reused)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
